nodes.name: Western tinkerbird
nodes.summary: The western tinkerbird (Pogoniulus coryphaea) is a species of bird in the family Lybiidae native to Central Africa, where it has been recorded at altitudes from 900 to 3,030 m (2,950 to 9,940 ft). It has a threefold area of presence : the Angolan montane forest–grassland mosaic, the Western High Plateau and the Albertine Rift montane forests. References

nodes.name: Pogoniulus
nodes.summary: Pogoniulus（Pogoniulus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Speckled tinkerbird、Green tinkerbird、Moustached tinkerbird等10种鸟类。
